race.description: Choices Flooring Seymour & Euroa Maiden Plate
race.comment: PROFILE (13) resumes and is ex James Cummings. Placed at Gosford on debut and has had minor throat surgery since. Has been well seasoned for her return and won her latest jump-out in good style. Draws the outside gate, but he has the blinkers on for the first time and certainly has the ability. BOYD (3) resumed at Yarra Valley in good order and has more to give. The free-running galloper jumps from the inside gate with the blinkers on again. Is sure to keep improving, and should go close. WEASEL SEA (10) also races forward and last time was beaten a whisker at Yarra Valley. Has been kept on the fresh side and will be in the frame with average luck in the run. STRONG BOX (9) resumes and has been gelded. His jump-outs suggest he'll go well.
